final:
module RefModule(
    input wire in2,
    input wire in1,
    input wire in0,
    output reg out1, // Changed from wire to reg
    output reg out0  // Changed from wire to reg
);reg [2:0] input_reg;

always @(*) begin
  input_reg = {in2, in1, in0} ;
  end

  always @(*) begin
  case (input_reg) 3'b000, 3'b111: begin out1 = 1 ; out0 = 0 ; end 3'b001, 3'b010, 3'b100, 3'b011, 3'b101, 3'b110: begin out1 = 0 ; out0 = 1 ; end default: begin out1 = 0 ; out0 = 0 ; end endcase;
  end

endmodule
